import requests
import json

page_id = '104244552728514'
access_token = 'EAAkTS3fejiABQgbv7dEpHTzlPmvopZBZCLPiZA0PvE4CZAp7i6YOdBZB966uDmXHslaR3HaHnKeMV1LfKeqnhdU6BdSD5PrirODqZBTDb7FPU21Vo4RuBrSxsxt1X3CDxlE66kbMKkN5K5tZCKcSgZBaibUEBtPZCgZAfvPeGjOaLUmamZCjUuZAcI2K9YSywy37Bb9pqagZD'
image_path = r'C:\Users\Revexn\Desktop\fb_post_image.png'

url = f'https://graph.facebook.com/v19.0/{page_id}/photos'

message_text = '''\U0001f680 First automated post from Cloud Controlled Agent!\n\nThis post was created, generated, and published entirely by AI running on Notion, with no human intervention.\nThe image was auto-generated, and publishing was done via Facebook Graph API.\n\n\U0001f916 Cloud-Controlled-Agent | Powered by Notion AI'''

with open(image_path, 'rb') as img:
    response = requests.post(
        url,
        files={'source': img},
        data={
            'message': message_text,
            'access_token': access_token
        }
    )

print(f'Status Code: {response.status_code}')
result = response.json()
print(f'Response: {json.dumps(result, indent=2)}')

if 'id' in result:
    post_id = result['id']
    print(f'Post ID: {post_id}')
    if '_' in post_id:
        parts = post_id.split('_')
        print(f'Post URL: https://www.facebook.com/{page_id}/posts/{parts[-1]}')
    else:
        print(f'Post URL: https://www.facebook.com/{page_id}/posts/{post_id}')
    print('SUCCESS: Post published!')
else:
    print(f'ERROR: {result}')
description: نشر الصورة مع النص على صفحة فيسبوك عبر Graph API
